locations.name: 新喀里多尼亞
locations.summary: 新喀里多尼亞（法語：Nouvelle-Calédonie，發音：[nuvɛl kaledɔni] ）是南太平洋的一组群岛，也是法國的一個特殊集体，位于澳大利亚以东1,210千米处，距法国本土17,000千米。该群岛是美拉尼西亚的一部分，包…

relations.subject: Cloven-feathered dove
relations.evidence: The cloven-feathered dove is endemic to New Caledonia where it is found in forest and Melaleuca savanna at altitudes up to . This species was formerly placed in the monotypic genus Drepanoptila. It is considered near-threatened by the IUCN due to habitat degradation and hunting
